# The purpose of research

- Fully understand the current codebase (`/src/backend/` and `/src/frontend/`)
- Write a structured report that answers to the research question below.

# The research question

Identify all the current implementations related to the privacy policy consent in the codebase.

# The outcome of research

- Create a `/.memo/CE/research/2025-09-16/policy-research.md` file to report your research results.
- The report should include the followings:
  - Code map
    - The list of relevant files (with paths)
      - The list of classes, components, interfaces, and functions (with line numbers) per file
    - The relationships between different parts of the codebase
        - The relationships between different components/APIs
            - The references to the exact source code file paths and the line numbers are required
    - The data flow inside the application
  - All possible UX flows
    - Identify the main UX flows
    - Identify any unplanned/unprecedented UX flows. Consider edge cases.
    - The references to the exact source code file paths and the line numbers

# The examples for references

Refer to the following example reports for guidance on the structure and content of your research report:

- `/.memo/CE/example1-research.md`
- `/.memo/CE/example2-research.md`
